sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value1 DOUBLE, value2 DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO test_numbers (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 2.5, 3.5), (2, 0, NULL), (3, NULL, 4.1);
SELECT id, power(value1, 2) AS square FROM test_numbers WHERE value2 IS NULL;
SELECT id, power(value2, 3) AS cube, (value1 || [1, 2]) AS concatenated FROM test_numbers WHERE value1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, power(value1, value2) AS result, NULLIF(value2, 0) AS safe_divisor FROM test_numbers;
SELECT id, (SELECT power(value1, value2) FROM test_numbers t2 WHERE t2.id = t1.id) AS power_result FROM test_numbers t1;
SELECT id, power(2, 3) || power(3, 2) AS power_concat FROM test_numbers;
SELECT data_array, power(2, cardinality(data_array)) AS power_cardinality FROM test_data WHERE data_array IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, power(2, 3) || (SELECT power(5, value1) FROM test_numbers t2 WHERE t2.id = t1.id) AS power_combined FROM test_numbers t1;
